YEP-Backed DRONOS Becomes a Finalist in Teknofest Acceleration Category

Supported by Kadir Has University Creative Industries Platform (YEP), DRONOS, a startup that aims to produce and distribute drones for special purposes in different sectors, became one of the 15 finalists in the Acceleration category of the Teknofest Space, Aviation and Defense Technologies Startup Competition.

We congratulate our students and continue to support them to continue their efforts successfully.
